outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH VOLATILITY: Negative GEX (-16.79B total) will amplify all price movements. Dealers short gamma = forced hedging accelerates directional moves.
outlook.summary: Market structure is heavily bearish with extreme put skew (2.05 ratio) and deeply negative gamma exposure across all expiries. Spot (6581.5) is trapped between massive monthly put wall at 6600 and confluence support at 6350. Max Pain at 6620 creates slight upward magnetic pull, but dealer hedging from short gamma positions will fuel volatility. Watch 6600 as critical inflection - break above targets 6620 Max Pain, failure targets 6350 support.
